rules.rule: Use exactly the article class on US Letter paper.
rules.exception: None for an official submission.

rules.rule: Load aaai2027 in submission mode for anonymous review and without submission mode for camera-ready copy.
rules.exception: The ccby option is conditional on explicit AAAI distribution-license instructions.

rules.rule: Required preamble commands must be active before begin{document}; commented examples do not count.
rules.exception: The aaai2027 package option differs by stage.

rules.rule: Keep the pdfinfo block limited to /TemplateVersion (2027.1).
rules.exception: Submission mode suppresses emitted metadata, but the source block is still required.

rules.rule: Do not load packages forbidden by the Author Kit or by aaai2027.sty.
rules.exception: Packages loaded internally by the unmodified official aaai2027.sty are not author-source violations.

rules.rule: Do not use commands that alter AAAI spacing, layout, fonts, floats, or copyright behavior.
rules.exception: setlength{tabcolsep} is handled by a dedicated exception rule.

rules.rule: Author-source setlength calls are forbidden except for table column spacing via tabcolsep.
rules.exception: setlength{tabcolsep}{...} is permitted for tables.

rules.rule: Crop graphics outside LaTeX; includegraphics must not use clip, trim, or viewport options.
rules.exception: Ordinary prose that merely mentions these strings is not a command violation.

rules.rule: Camera-ready copy must not contain manual page-break commands.
rules.exception: None for final camera-ready copy.

rules.rule: Avoid manual page breaks in anonymous copy unless the event instructions require one.
rules.event_policy: Some review processes may require references on a separate page.

rules.rule: maketitle must precede one complete abstract environment, and the abstract must precede links and main sections.
rules.exception: None for an official paper.

rules.rule: The abstract must not contain references through any cite-family command.
rules.exception: None.

rules.rule: Anonymous source must use Anonymous Submission as the sole author and an empty affiliations block.
rules.exception: No identifying author or affiliation material may remain active.

rules.rule: Camera-ready source must contain real author and affiliation information and must not use Anonymous Submission.
rules.exception: None after acceptance.

rules.rule: An optional links block belongs between the abstract and main body in both stages.
rules.exception: Anonymous links are allowed only when they do not reveal identity; identity safety requires human review.

rules.rule: Do not split paper sections with input/include; .bib files are referenced with bibliography, never input.
rules.exception: The exact input{ReproducibilityChecklist.tex} command is permitted only when checklist policy is embedded.

rules.rule: Whether anonymous-review source may be split across files is event-specific.
rules.event_policy: Report non-checklist input/include commands as NEEDS_POLICY rather than applying the camera-ready packaging rule.

rules.rule: .bib files must be referenced through bibliography{...}, not input/include.
rules.exception: None; a .bib file is a separate archive file, not an input exception.

rules.rule: Order main sections, content appendices, Ethical Statement, Acknowledgments, References, then only conference-permitted supplementary material.
rules.exception: Technical appendix placement is governed by the selected event policy.

rules.rule: Content appendices are part of the main paper, count toward the event page limit, and must precede References.
rules.exception: Lettered appendix numbering is required only when main sections are numbered.

rules.rule: Supplementary Material / Technical Appendices may be inline, separate, or forbidden depending on the conference.
rules.event_policy: Set --technical-appendix to inline, separate, forbidden, or leave unknown for NEEDS_POLICY.

rules.rule: The reproducibility checklist may be embedded, submitted separately, or not required depending on the event.
rules.event_policy: Set --checklist to embedded, separate, not-required, or leave unknown for NEEDS_POLICY.

rules.rule: Use bibliography{...} near the end and do not issue a manual bibliographystyle command.
rules.exception: An embedded checklist may follow bibliography before end{document}.

rules.rule: Use (Author Year) without an author-year comma; list all three authors and use et al. only for four or more.
rules.exception: This is governed by aaai2027.bst plus aaai2027.sty and is not inferred from raw citation commands.

rules.rule: Audit the compiled PDF for version, encryption, Type 3 fonts, page size, links/bookmarks, and visible layout.
rules.exception: A missing PDF must be reported as NOT_CHECKED, never PASS.

rules.rule: Inspect the LaTeX log for compilation errors and overfull boxes.
rules.exception: A missing log must be reported as NOT_CHECKED, never PASS.

rules.rule: Inspect the submitted archive for required and unused files; camera-ready archives must be at most 10 MB.
rules.exception: A missing camera-ready package must be reported as NOT_CHECKED, never PASS.

rules.rule: Anonymous-review archive requirements and file naming are event-specific.
rules.event_policy: Inspect an supplied archive conservatively, but do not impose the camera-ready single-source, surname, or 10 MB publication-package rules.

rules.rule: Page limits are event-specific; content appendices count as main-paper content.
rules.event_policy: Use --page-limit only with the applicable event limit; reference-page treatment still requires manual verification.
